name: Indiana Beach
formerNames: Ideal Beach; Indiana Beach Amusement Resort
city: 5224 East Indiana Beach Blvd, Monticello, Indiana
description: Indiana Beach is an amusement park located on Lake Shafer in Monticello, Indiana.  The resort was developed by the Spackman family, who owned it from 1926 to 2008.  The park was then sold to Morgan RV LLC, Apex Parks Group, LLC, and now is owned and operated by IB Parks & Entertainment.
